title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your wallet, security, and preferences.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.body: Customize how the wallet looks on this device.

security.title: Security & lock
security.body: Manage automatic locking of your wallet.

theme.label: Theme
theme.helper: Dark theme is available; “System” follows your OS preference.

autoLock.label: Auto-lock
autoLock.helper: Wallet locks after this period of inactivity.
autoLock.lockOnHiddenHelper: Lock immediately whenever you switch away from this tab.

password.title: Password
password.body: Used to encrypt your wallet on this device.

seed.title: Seed phrase
seed.body: Reveal the secret that controls this wallet. Never share it.

modal.title: View seed phrase
modal.warning: Anyone with this key controls your wallet. Never share it. We never ask for it.
modal.autoHide: This will hide automatically in 60 seconds.

lockNow.title: Lock now
lockNow.body: Immediately lock the wallet on this device.

reset.title: Reset wallet
reset.body: Erase the encrypted wallet on this device. You can restore from your seed phrase.

modal.title: Reset wallet?
modal.body: All accounts on this device will be removed. Your seed phrase still works to import them again — without it, funds are unrecoverable.

modal.title: Delete account?
modal.body: Removing {{label}} from this device cannot be undone — you'll need the seed phrase to import it again.

subAccounts.title: Sub-accounts
subAccounts.subtitle: Use destination tags to group payments for {{label}}.

empty.title: No sub-accounts yet
empty.body: Sub-accounts let you receive grouped payments via destination tags.

fields.label: Label
fields.dtHelper: Any number 0–4294967295. Senders include it to identify your sub-account.

errors.tagDuplicate: Tag is already used in this account

delete.title: Delete sub-account?
delete.body: {{label}} will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

tokens.notMultiChain: Custom tokens are available for multi-chain wallets only. Re-import your seed phrase to enable EVM.

list.title: Added tokens
list.empty: No custom tokens yet. Add a contract address above.

scamWarning.title: Verify the contract before adding
scamWarning.body: Anyone can deploy a fake ERC-20. Make sure the address comes from a trusted source — block explorer, project's official site, or a verified token list. The wallet does not endorse imported tokens.

add.title: Add a token
add.body: Add an ERC-20 token by its contract address. Name, symbol and decimals are read directly from the contract on-chain.
add.addressHelper: Paste the 0x… contract address. We'll fetch the metadata.

errors.invalid_address: This is not a valid contract address.
errors.no_contract: No contract found at this address on the selected network.
errors.not_erc20: This contract is not an ERC-20 token.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the network. Try again in a moment.
